context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the apply-code-conventions instructions from the published Rails Agent Skills tile.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Detect → run → defer. Do not invent style rules.

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Run linter** — detect config, run the appropriate tool, note absence if none found.

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Check area-specific rules** — apply the "Apply by area" table below to each changed path.

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Verify tests gate** — confirm failing tests exist before any new behavior; run specs and checkpoints.

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Only recommend `let_it_be` if `test-prof` is already in `Gemfile.lock`. Otherwise default to `let`; reach for `let!` only when lazy evaluation would break the example. Don't introduce `test-prof` unless asked.
